fa-building-circle-check.appearanceId: building silhouette with a small filled circle containing a checkmark badge overlaid at the corner; rectangular structure outline with a confirmation badge
fa-building-circle-check.functionalityId: marks a building or facility as verified or approved; confirms a location meets required criteria
fa-building-circle-check.intentId: certify or validate a building or organization; confirm a facility has passed an inspection or approval

fa-building-circle-exclamation.appearanceId: building silhouette with a small filled circle containing an exclamation mark badge at the corner; rectangular structure outline with a warning badge
fa-building-circle-exclamation.functionalityId: flags a building or facility as having an alert or issue; warns that a location requires attention
fa-building-circle-exclamation.intentId: investigate a problem or warning at a facility; acknowledge a building-related alert

fa-building-circle-xmark.appearanceId: building silhouette with a small filled circle containing an X mark badge at the corner; rectangular structure outline with a removal or rejection badge
fa-building-circle-xmark.functionalityId: marks a building or location as closed, removed, or rejected; disables or deletes a facility entry
fa-building-circle-xmark.intentId: remove or close a building from a list; indicate a facility is no longer available or approved

fa-building-flag.appearanceId: building silhouette with a small flag or pennant mounted on top; rectangular structure outline with a waving flag at the roof
fa-building-flag.functionalityId: marks a location as a headquarters or flagged facility; labels a building with a national or organizational flag
fa-building-flag.intentId: identify a government or official headquarters building; mark a location with a national or institutional designation

fa-building-lock.appearanceId: building silhouette with a padlock shape overlaid at the base or corner; rectangular structure outline with a lock badge
fa-building-lock.functionalityId: marks a building or facility as secured or access-restricted; locks down a location or organization record
fa-building-lock.intentId: restrict access to a facility or building; indicate a secured or private location

fa-building-magnifying-glass.appearanceId: building silhouette with a magnifying glass overlaid at the corner; rectangular structure outline with a search lens symbol
fa-building-magnifying-glass.functionalityId: searches for a building or facility; opens a location or property search tool
fa-building-magnifying-glass.intentId: find a specific building or facility by name or address; browse and look up organizational locations

fa-building-memo.appearanceId: building silhouette with a small memo or document page overlaid at the corner; rectangular structure outline with a note or paper badge
fa-building-memo.functionalityId: attaches or views a memo or note linked to a building; opens property or facility documentation
fa-building-memo.intentId: review notes or records associated with a facility; document information about a building or organization

fa-building-ngo.appearanceId: building silhouette with the letters NGO displayed on or beside it; rectangular structure outline labeled with an organization acronym
fa-building-ngo.functionalityId: marks a location as a non-governmental organization; identifies a facility as an NGO headquarters or office
fa-building-ngo.intentId: identify an NGO or non-profit organization building; navigate to resources associated with a non-governmental body

fa-building-shield.appearanceId: building silhouette with a shield shape overlaid at the corner; rectangular structure outline with a protective badge symbol
fa-building-shield.functionalityId: marks a building as protected or secure; indicates a facility with security or safety designation
fa-building-shield.intentId: identify a secured or protected facility; indicate that a building has security measures in place

fa-building-un.appearanceId: building silhouette with the letters UN displayed on or beside it; rectangular structure outline labeled with a United Nations acronym
fa-building-un.functionalityId: marks a location as a United Nations facility or related office; identifies a building as a UN-affiliated site
fa-building-un.intentId: identify a United Nations building or affiliated organization; navigate to UN-related resources or facilities

fa-building-user.appearanceId: building silhouette with a small person or user figure overlaid at the corner; rectangular structure outline with a human silhouette badge
fa-building-user.functionalityId: associates a building with a specific user or occupant; opens user-specific building or office assignment
fa-building-user.intentId: identify a person's assigned building or workplace; link a user account to a facility or office location

fa-building-wheat.appearanceId: building silhouette with a wheat stalk or grain sheaf overlaid at the corner; rectangular structure outline with an agricultural crop badge
fa-building-wheat.functionalityId: marks a building as an agricultural or food production facility; identifies a grain storage or food-related structure
fa-building-wheat.intentId: locate an agricultural facility or food production site; identify a building associated with grain or crop management

fa-buildings.appearanceId: two rectangular building silhouettes of different heights placed side by side; pair of urban structure outlines forming a city block
fa-buildings.functionalityId: navigates to a buildings directory or property list; displays a multi-building campus or organization view
fa-buildings.intentId: browse a list of facilities or office buildings; view multiple properties or locations at once

fa-bulldozer.appearanceId: heavy construction vehicle silhouette with a wide flat blade at the front and large tracks at the base; side-view earth-moving machine with a front shovel
fa-bulldozer.functionalityId: marks construction or demolition activity; indicates heavy machinery or site preparation work
fa-bulldozer.intentId: track construction or land-clearing activity; identify a site that involves heavy earthmoving work

fa-bullhorn.appearanceId: conical megaphone or loudspeaker silhouette with a wide open end and a handle; tapered horn shape with a grip
fa-bullhorn.functionalityId: broadcasts or publishes a public announcement; sends a mass notification or alert to an audience
fa-bullhorn.intentId: make a public or group-wide announcement; reach a broad audience with an urgent message

fa-bullseye.appearanceId: concentric circle target with alternating rings and a filled center dot; nested ring pattern forming a shooting target
fa-bullseye.functionalityId: sets or highlights a goal or target metric; focuses a view on a primary objective
fa-bullseye.intentId: define a specific goal or accuracy target; indicate precision or achievement of an objective

fa-bullseye-arrow.appearanceId: concentric ring target with an arrow piercing the center dot; nested circle target with a shaft and fletching embedded in the middle
fa-bullseye-arrow.functionalityId: marks a precise hit or achieved target; navigates directly to a goal or pinpointed result
fa-bullseye-arrow.intentId: confirm an accurate hit or goal achievement; indicate precise targeting or on-target performance

fa-bullseye-pointer.appearanceId: concentric ring target with a cursor pointer arrow overlaid at the center; nested circle target with a mouse pointer in the middle
fa-bullseye-pointer.functionalityId: activates a precision click or selection tool; focuses cursor interaction on a target point
fa-bullseye-pointer.intentId: select or click a precise UI target; enable accurate pointer-based interaction with a focal point

fa-buoy.appearanceId: rounded spherical or cylindrical floating marker with a top point or dome; bobbing water navigation marker silhouette
fa-buoy.functionalityId: marks a nautical waypoint or water hazard location; indicates a floating reference point on a map
fa-buoy.intentId: navigate using a water marker or buoy position; identify a maritime safety or navigation point

fa-buoy-mooring.appearanceId: rounded buoy shape with a ring or anchor attachment at the base; floating marker silhouette with a mooring loop or chain
fa-buoy-mooring.functionalityId: marks a mooring or docking position on a waterway; indicates a designated vessel tie-up point
fa-buoy-mooring.intentId: find or reserve a mooring spot for a boat; identify a designated anchoring location on the water

fa-burger.appearanceId: stacked layers of a rounded top bun, circular patty, and flat bottom bun; tall layered sandwich silhouette with a domed lid
fa-burger.functionalityId: tags content or a venue as serving burgers; navigates to a burger or fast food menu
fa-burger.intentId: find a burger restaurant or menu item; browse fast food or burger-related content

fa-burger-fries.appearanceId: stacked burger silhouette beside a tall rectangular container of vertical fry sticks; hamburger shape next to a box of french fries
fa-burger-fries.functionalityId: marks a fast food combo meal option; navigates to burger and fries menu items
fa-burger-fries.intentId: order a burger and fries combo; browse fast food combo meal offerings

fa-burger-glass.appearanceId: stacked burger bun and patty layers beside a tall drinking glass with a straw; hamburger silhouette next to a beverage cup
fa-burger-glass.functionalityId: marks a burger and drink combo on a menu; links to a meal deal including a burger and beverage
fa-burger-glass.intentId: order a burger meal with a drink; browse combo deals that include a burger and beverage

fa-burger-lettuce.appearanceId: stacked burger silhouette with a ruffled or wavy lettuce leaf visible between the layers; layered sandwich showing leafy greens between bun and patty
fa-burger-lettuce.functionalityId: marks a burger containing lettuce or fresh toppings; filters menu items to include vegetable toppings
fa-burger-lettuce.intentId: find a fresh or veggie-topped burger option; indicate a preference for salad toppings on a burger

fa-burger-soda.appearanceId: stacked burger silhouette beside a soda cup with a straw and domed lid; hamburger shape next to a capped fountain drink cup
fa-burger-soda.functionalityId: marks a burger and soda combo meal; navigates to fast food combo menu options
fa-burger-soda.intentId: order a burger and soft drink combo; browse fast food value meal pairings

fa-burn.appearanceId: upward-pointing flame silhouette with a tapered tip and flowing base; flickering fire shape with curving sides
fa-burn.functionalityId: burns or destroys data on a disc; marks content as high-intensity or trending
fa-burn.intentId: write data to an optical disc; indicate a hot or high-energy activity

fa-burrito.appearanceId: cylindrical wrapped tortilla roll with twisted or folded ends; oblong wrapped food bundle silhouette
fa-burrito.functionalityId: tags content or a venue as serving burritos; navigates to a Mexican food or wrap menu
fa-burrito.intentId: find a burrito or Mexican food option; browse wrapped food or Tex-Mex menu items

fa-burst.appearanceId: starburst or explosion shape with multiple outward-pointing spikes radiating from a central point; jagged multi-point radial star silhouette
fa-burst.functionalityId: highlights a new or featured item with an attention-grabbing burst; triggers an animated emphasis effect
fa-burst.intentId: draw attention to a new feature or special offer; indicate an exciting or newly added item

fa-bus.appearanceId: side-view rectangular bus silhouette with multiple windows and large wheels; boxy public transit vehicle profile with a flat roof
fa-bus.functionalityId: shows bus routes or nearby bus stops; indicates public transportation options
fa-bus.intentId: find a bus route or stop nearby; plan a journey using public bus transport

fa-bus-alt.appearanceId: side-view bus silhouette with a slightly rounded front and rows of windows; alternative transit vehicle profile with a curved nose
fa-bus-alt.functionalityId: displays alternative bus service options; indicates a different bus line or transit route
fa-bus-alt.intentId: find an alternative bus route or service; explore different public transit bus options

fa-bus-school.appearanceId: side-view rounded school bus silhouette with a flat nose, multiple windows, and large wheels; classic yellow transit vehicle profile with a boxy body
fa-bus-school.functionalityId: marks school bus routes or pickup locations; indicates student transportation services
fa-bus-school.intentId: find a school bus stop or route; manage student transportation logistics

fa-business-time.appearanceId: briefcase silhouette with a clock face overlaid or embedded; rectangular business bag with a circular timepiece dial
fa-business-time.functionalityId: opens business hours or work schedule settings; displays time-related business or productivity tools
fa-business-time.intentId: check or set business operating hours; manage a work schedule or professional timetable

fa-butter.appearanceId: rectangular block or stick of butter with a flat top and slightly rounded corners; oblong solid block silhouette representing a dairy pat
fa-butter.functionalityId: tags content or a recipe as containing butter; marks a food item with a dairy ingredient
fa-butter.intentId: indicate a recipe uses butter; filter food items by dairy content

fa-c.appearanceId: bold uppercase letter C with an open curved right side; single arc-shaped alphabetic glyph
fa-c.functionalityId: inserts or labels the letter C; selects or navigates to a C-categorized item
fa-c.intentId: represent the third letter of the alphabet; identify something indexed or labeled C

fa-cab.appearanceId: side-view taxi cab silhouette with a rectangular roof sign on top; sedan vehicle profile with a cab indicator light
fa-cab.functionalityId: requests or hails a taxi or cab ride; shows nearby cab or ride-hailing options
fa-cab.intentId: get a taxi or cab to a destination; find nearby ride-for-hire transportation

fa-cabin.appearanceId: small house silhouette with a steeply pitched triangular roof and simple square body; compact rustic dwelling profile with a peaked gable
fa-cabin.functionalityId: marks or books a cabin or lodge accommodation; navigates to rustic rental listings
fa-cabin.intentId: find or reserve a cabin or wilderness lodge; browse rustic or nature retreat accommodations

fa-cabinet-filing.appearanceId: tall rectangular filing cabinet with two or three horizontal drawer fronts and small handle tabs; upright multi-drawer storage unit silhouette
fa-cabinet-filing.functionalityId: opens the file cabinet or document archive; accesses stored files or organized records
fa-cabinet-filing.intentId: retrieve stored documents or archived files; manage physical or digital file organization

fa-cactus.appearanceId: upright cactus silhouette with a tall central column and two shorter side arms curving upward; desert plant with rounded branches and spine bumps
fa-cactus.functionalityId: tags content as desert-themed or southwestern; marks a location with an arid or desert environment
fa-cactus.intentId: indicate a desert setting or southwestern theme; apply a cactus or dry-climate label to content

fa-caduceus.appearanceId: vertical staff with two serpents spiraling upward around it and a pair of wings at the top; winged rod entwined with two snakes
fa-caduceus.functionalityId: marks content as medical or healthcare related; navigates to health or medicine category
fa-caduceus.intentId: identify medical or healthcare services; access health-related information or resources

fa-cake.appearanceId: round layered cake with a lit candle on top and horizontal frosting lines around the side; tiered birthday dessert silhouette with a single flame
fa-cake.functionalityId: marks a birthday event or celebration; adds a cake or party symbol to a date or event
fa-cake.intentId: celebrate a birthday or anniversary; indicate a festive dessert or party event

fa-calculator.appearanceId: rectangular device body with a small display screen at the top and rows of square buttons below; handheld calculator silhouette with grid keypad
fa-calculator.functionalityId: opens a calculator or numeric computation tool; performs arithmetic or math operations
fa-calculator.intentId: calculate a numeric value or expression; access a quick math tool for computations

fa-calculator-alt.appearanceId: rectangular calculator body with a wider display and slightly different button arrangement; alternate handheld calculator silhouette with a spacious screen area
fa-calculator-alt.functionalityId: opens an alternative or scientific calculator; accesses extended math or conversion functions
fa-calculator-alt.intentId: perform more complex or extended calculations; access a calculator with additional functions

fa-calendar.appearanceId: rectangular calendar page with two top hanging rings and a grid of date rows below a header band; monthly planner silhouette with row-and-column date grid
fa-calendar.functionalityId: opens the calendar or date picker; navigates to a monthly or weekly schedule view
fa-calendar.intentId: view or select a date on a calendar; manage appointments or scheduled events

fa-calendar-alt.appearanceId: rectangular calendar with two top rings and a simplified date grid showing a few rows of day cells; alternative monthly planner silhouette with sparse grid lines
fa-calendar-alt.functionalityId: opens an alternate calendar or schedule view; switches to a different calendar layout or format
fa-calendar-alt.intentId: view a schedule in a different calendar format; access an alternative date or event view

fa-calendar-check.appearanceId: rectangular calendar grid with a checkmark symbol overlaid on the date area; monthly planner silhouette with a confirmation tick on a date cell
fa-calendar-check.functionalityId: marks an event or date as completed or confirmed; checks off a scheduled item from the calendar
fa-calendar-check.intentId: confirm attendance or completion of a scheduled event; mark a calendar date as done or verified

fa-calendar-circle.appearanceId: rectangular calendar grid with a filled circle badge overlaid at the corner; monthly planner silhouette with a round indicator dot
fa-calendar-circle.functionalityId: marks a calendar date with a circular status indicator; highlights a specific date or event on the calendar
fa-calendar-circle.intentId: flag a particular date with a status marker; highlight an important day on the calendar

fa-calendar-circle-exclamation.appearanceId: rectangular calendar grid with a filled circle containing an exclamation mark badge at the corner; monthly planner silhouette with a warning dot indicator
fa-calendar-circle-exclamation.functionalityId: flags a calendar event or date with an urgent warning; alerts the user to a critical scheduling conflict or deadline
fa-calendar-circle-exclamation.intentId: draw attention to a high-priority date or event; acknowledge an urgent calendar alert

fa-calendar-circle-minus.appearanceId: rectangular calendar grid with a filled circle containing a minus symbol badge at the corner; monthly planner silhouette with a removal indicator dot
fa-calendar-circle-minus.functionalityId: removes or cancels an event from the calendar; deletes a scheduled entry from a date
fa-calendar-circle-minus.intentId: cancel or remove a scheduled event; clear a date from the calendar
